mapper.select: select va.id, va.apartment_id as apartment_id, va.appointment_time, va.appointment_status, ai.name apartment_name from view_appointment va left join apartment_info ai on va.apartment_id = ai.id and ai.is_deleted = 0 where va.is_deleted = 0 and user_id = #{id} order by va.id desc

select item_id as apartmentId, url, name from graph_info where is_deleted = 0 and item_type = 1 and item_id in
#{id}
